title: Junior Investment Banker at Shriram Finance Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Shriram Finance Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Shriram Finance Holdings Services in Ludhiana is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Shriram Finance Holdings Services:
Shriram Finance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance Holdings Services!
